notes: The catppuccin-alignment milestone's only implementation feature (catppuccin-exact-colors-and-accent-picker) has an empty fulfills field — no formal validation contract assertions are mapped to this milestone. All 69 existing assertions in validation-state.json are already passed from prior milestones. User testing was performed to verify the visual correctness of the Catppuccin theme alignment changes through the real user surface.

checks.detail: base=#1e1e2e, text=#cdd6f4, green=#a6e3a1, lavender=#b4befe, blue=#89b4fa, red=#f38ba8, mauve=#cba6f7 — all match official Catppuccin palette

base=#303446, text=#c6d0f5, green=#a6d189, lavender=#babbf1, blue=#8caaee, red=#e78284, mauve=#ca9ee6 — all match official Catppuccin palette
All semantic tokens (background→base, foreground→text, card→mantle, primary→accent, secondary→surface0, muted→surface1, border→surface0/s1, sidebar→mantle) correctly mapped across all 4 flavors

Switching accent via data-accent attribute correctly updates --primary, --ring, --sidebar-primary to the corresponding Catppuccin named color. Verified Green (#a6e3a1 on Mocha) and Mauve (#ca9ee6 on Frappé)

rosewater=#f5e0dc, flamingo=#f2cdcd, pink=#f5c2e7, mauve=#cba6f7, red=#f38ba8, maroon=#eba0ac, peach=#fab387, yellow=#f9e2af, green=#a6e3a1, teal=#94e2d5, sky=#89dceb, sapphire=#74c7ec, blue=#89b4fa, lavender=#b4befe — all 14 match official palette
Settings page shows Accent Color radiogroup with all 14 options (Rosewater through Lavender), Lavender checked by default
Settings page shows 4 flavor buttons: Mocha, Macchiato, Frappé, Latte with correct pressed state

checks.check: Flavor and accent persistence across reload
checks.detail: After switching to Mocha flavor and Green accent, reloading the page preserves both (localStorage catppuccin-flavor=mocha, catppuccin-accent=green)
